case_number: Constitutional petition is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1188 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.4747/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 28-10-2025 Mr. Shafique Ahmed Khan Leghari, Advocate along with Petitioner Mr. Mushtaque Ahmed Shahani, Advocate for Respondent No.10 to 15 Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant AG Sindh along with Naheed Ali Mirani, ADC-I, Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< Naheed Ali Mirani, Additional Deputy Commissioner-I, Sukkur present in Court files compliance report / statement along with photographs, which is taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the Petitioner. Counsel for the Petitioner after going through the compliance report, under instructions, does not press the instant Constitutional Petition and submits that at the first instance, the Petitioner for redressal of his grievances will approach the Revenue hierarchy or the competent Civil Court in accordance with the law. In view of above, the instant Constitutional petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. The petitioner is at liberty to approach the revenue hierarchy or the competent civil Court for redressal of his grievances. However, the official respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
